description: Weekly recurring slots, scheduling configuration (autoConfirm, minCancelNoticeHours) and availability computation for clinics and professionals

context.dependencies: Sprint 03 (Appointments) and Sprint 06 (Schema enrichment) must be complete

prompts.name: weekly-slot-schema-and-dto
prompts.description: Create the shared WeeklySlot subdocument schema and DTO

prompts.name: extend-clinic-and-professional-schemas
prompts.description: Add weeklySlots, autoConfirm and minCancelNoticeHours to Clinic and Professional schemas
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

The WeeklySlot schema already exists at apps/api/src/common/schemas/weekly-slot.schema.ts (created in prompt 1). Import WeeklySlot and WeeklySlotSchema from there.

Update apps/api/src/clinics/schemas/clinic.schema.ts:
- Keep all existing fields
- Add @Prop({ type: [WeeklySlotSchema], default: [] }) weeklySlots: WeeklySlot[];
- Add @Prop({ type: Boolean, default: false }) autoConfirm: boolean;
- Add @Prop({ type: Number, default: 24, min: 0, max: 168 }) minCancelNoticeHours: number;

Update apps/api/src/professionals/schemas/professional.schema.ts:
- Keep all existing fields
- Add the same three fields with the same defaults

Do not change existing logic, indexes or other fields.

prompts.name: professional-availability-schema
prompts.description: Create the ProfessionalAvailability collection for date-specific overrides

prompts.name: availability-dtos
compute-slots-utility
prompts.description: Pure function for computing available time slots given weekly config and existing appointments
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. This is a PURE function — no DB, no NestJS dependencies.

Create apps/api/src/availability/utils/compute-slots.ts:
- import { WeeklySlot } from '../../common/schemas/weekly-slot.schema';
- export interface AvailableSlot { date: string; startAt: Date; endAt: Date; durationMinutes: number; }
- export function computeSlotsForDay(date: Date, weeklySlots: WeeklySlot[], appointments: { startAt: Date; endAt: Date }[]): AvailableSlot[]
  - const dayOfWeek = date.getDay();
  - const slotsForDay = weeklySlots.filter(s => s.dayOfWeek === dayOfWeek);
  - const result: AvailableSlot[] = [];
  - for (const config of slotsForDay):
    - parse startTime and endTime to numbers
    - cursor = new Date(date) with startH/startM
    - dayEnd = new Date(date) with endH/endM
    - while (cursor + slotDuration <= dayEnd):
      - slotEnd = new Date(cursor + slotDuration)
      - overlaps = appointments.some(a => a.startAt < slotEnd && a.endAt > cursor)
      - if (!overlaps): push { date: YYYY-MM-DD, startAt, endAt: slotEnd, durationMinutes: config.slotDurationMinutes }
      - cursor = slotEnd
  - return result

Create apps/api/src/availability/tests/slot-computation.spec.ts:
- describe('computeSlotsForDay')
- Tests:
  1. 'computes slots for a Monday with 09:00-12:00, 30min duration' — Monday 2026-01-05, weeklySlots=[{dayOfWeek:1,startTime:'09:00',endTime:'12:00',slotDurationMinutes:30}], no appointments → 6 slots starting at 09:00, 09:30, 10:00, 10:30, 11:00, 11:30
  2. 'skips slot that exactly matches an appointment' — same setup but with appointment 10:00-10:30 → 5 slots, no 10:00
  3. 'keeps adjacent non-overlapping slots' — appointment 10:00-10:30 should NOT block 10:30-11:00
  4. 'returns empty when no weekly config matches day' — Sunday date with weeklySlots only for Monday → []
  5. 'handles two separate slot windows on same day' — weeklySlots = [{dayOfWeek:1, 08:00-12:00, 60min}, {dayOfWeek:1, 14:00-18:00, 60min}] → 8 slots total
  6. 'ignores cancelled appointments parameter (caller must filter)' — note: this util receives only non-cancelled appointments; cancelled filtering is the SERVICE's responsibility. So this test verifies that ALL appointments passed in block their slots — no filtering happens in the util.

prompts.name: availability-service
prompts.description: Service to manage slot configuration and compute availability over a date range
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing file if it exists. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

The following already exist — import them:
- ProfessionalAvailability schema (created in prompt 3)
- DTOs (created in prompt 4)
- computeSlotsForDay utility (created in prompt 5)
- Professional schema, Clinic schema, Appointment schema with AppointmentStatus enum

Create apps/api/src/availability/availability.service.ts:
- @Injectable() class AvailabilityService
- constructor injects:
  - @InjectModel(Professional.name) professionalModel
  - @InjectModel(Clinic.name) clinicModel
  - @InjectModel(Appointment.name) appointmentModel
  - @InjectModel(ProfessionalAvailability.name) availabilityModel

Methods:
- async getAvailableSlots(professionalId: string, query: GetAvailabilityQueryDto): Promise<AvailableSlot[]>
  - Validate ObjectId
  - Parse fromDate, toDate to Date objects (date only, time = 00:00:00)
  - Validate fromDate <= toDate (throw BadRequestException)
  - Validate range <= 30 days (throw BadRequestException)
  - Fetch professional or throw NotFoundException
  - Fetch overrides: availabilityModel.find({ professionalId, date: { $gte: fromDate, $lte: toDate } })
  - Fetch appointments: appointmentModel.find({ professionalId, status: { $ne: AppointmentStatus.CANCELLED }, startAt: { $gte: fromDate }, endAt: { $lte: toDateEndOfDay } })
  - For each date in range:
    - Find override for that date
    - If override exists and isUnavailable === true → skip
    - slotsToUse = override?.customSlots?.length > 0 ? override.customSlots : professional.weeklySlots
    - dayAppointments = appointments.filter(a => same date)
    - slots = computeSlotsForDay(date, slotsToUse, dayAppointments)
    - push to result
  - return flat array

- async updateProfessionalSlots(professionalId: string, dto: UpdateWeeklySlotsDto): Promise<ProfessionalDocument>
  - findByIdAndUpdate({ weeklySlots: dto.weeklySlots }, { new: true }) or throw NotFoundException

- async updateClinicSlots(clinicId: string, dto: UpdateWeeklySlotsDto): Promise<ClinicDocument>
  - same pattern on clinicModel

- async updateProfessionalConfig(professionalId: string, dto: UpdateSchedulingConfigDto): Promise<ProfessionalDocument>
  - findByIdAndUpdate with provided fields

- async updateClinicConfig(clinicId: string, dto: UpdateSchedulingConfigDto): Promise<ClinicDocument>
  - same pattern

- async setUnavailableDay(professionalId: string, date: string): Promise<ProfessionalAvailabilityDocument>
  - upsert: availabilityModel.findOneAndUpdate({ professionalId, date }, { isUnavailable: true }, { upsert: true, new: true })

- async removeAvailabilityOverride(professionalId: string, date: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }>
  - deleteOne; if deletedCount === 0 throw NotFoundException; return { success: true }

prompts.name: availability-controller-and-module
prompts.description: Wire the controller (with public availability read endpoint) and module
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Create apps/api/src/availability/availability.controller.ts:
- @Controller('availability')
- constructor(private readonly availabilityService: AvailabilityService)

- @Get('professionals/:professionalId') — PUBLIC, no @UseGuards
  getAvailability(@Param('professionalId', ParseMongoIdPipe) id, @Query() query: GetAvailabilityQueryDto)

- The remaining endpoints below are PROTECTED. Apply @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard) at method level (not class level, so the GET above stays public):

- @Put('professionals/:professionalId/weekly-slots')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard) @Roles(Role.PROFESSIONAL, Role.CLINIC)
  updateProfessionalSlots()

- @Put('clinics/:clinicId/weekly-slots')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard) @Roles(Role.CLINIC)
  updateClinicSlots()

- @Put('professionals/:professionalId/config')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard) @Roles(Role.PROFESSIONAL, Role.CLINIC)
  updateProfessionalConfig()

- @Put('clinics/:clinicId/config')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard) @Roles(Role.CLINIC)
  updateClinicConfig()

- @Post('professionals/:professionalId/unavailable')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard) @Roles(Role.PROFESSIONAL, Role.CLINIC, Role.ATTENDANT)
  setUnavailableDay(@Param professionalId, @Body() body: { date: string })

- @Delete('professionals/:professionalId/unavailable/:date')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard) @Roles(Role.PROFESSIONAL, Role.CLINIC, Role.ATTENDANT)
  removeAvailabilityOverride()

Create apps/api/src/availability/availability.module.ts:
- Imports MongooseModule.forFeature for Professional, Clinic, Appointment, ProfessionalAvailability
- providers: [AvailabilityService]
- controllers: [AvailabilityController]
- exports: [AvailabilityService]

Update apps/api/src/app.module.ts:
- Import AvailabilityModule
- Add to imports array

prompts.name: availability-service-tests
prompts.description: Unit tests for AvailabilityService covering validation, overrides and unavailable days
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the file if it exists. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Create apps/api/src/availability/tests/availability.service.spec.ts:
- Mock all 4 models (professionalModel, clinicModel, appointmentModel, availabilityModel)
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())

Tests:
- 'getAvailableSlots — fromDate > toDate throws BadRequestException'
- 'getAvailableSlots — range > 30 days throws BadRequestException'
- 'getAvailableSlots — professional not found throws NotFoundException'
- 'getAvailableSlots — applies override customSlots to specific date': override has customSlots different from weeklySlots; verify override slots are used for that date only
- 'getAvailableSlots — unavailable day returns no slots for that date': override has isUnavailable=true; verify that date is skipped
- 'updateProfessionalSlots — saves correctly': verify findByIdAndUpdate called with { weeklySlots }
- 'setUnavailableDay — upserts override doc with isUnavailable=true'
- 'removeAvailabilityOverride — when no doc exists throws NotFoundException'
- 'removeAvailabilityOverride — when doc deleted returns { success: true }'

prompts.description: Add availability interfaces to the shared types package
